name: Paytrix
description: Single payment curation API across many payout/acquiring rails.

seo.title: Paytrix — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paytrix: Single payment curation API across many payout/acquiring rails.

when_to_use: Single API for payout and acquiring across multiple rails
Switching between payment providers without re-integration
Unified reconciliation across global payout methods

pros: Single API across many PSPs and rails
review.verdict: Useful curation layer for fintechs juggling multiple PSPs, but only pays off at meaningful scale.
review.best_for: Scaling fintechs and treasuries consolidating many payout and acquiring rails
review.not_for: Single-country merchants who need only one PSP
